prompt: Extract all names, addresses, and phone numbers from the following text and format as a database.
response:
Okay, please provide the text you want me to extract information from. I need the text itself to be able to create the database. 

Once you paste the text here, I will do my best to extract the names, addresses, and phone numbers and format them into a database-like structure. 

**Example of how the output will look (this is just an example, the actual format will depend on the text you provide):**

| Name          | Address                      | Phone Number   |
|---------------|------------------------------|----------------|
| John Doe      | 123 Main St, Anytown, CA 91234 | 555-123-4567   |
| Jane Smith    | 456 Oak Ave, Somecity, NY 10001 | 555-987-6543   |
| ...           | ...                          | ...            |
